title: Pillowy Sweet Indian Rice Dosa
description: A sweet and comforting Mangalorean dish featuring sugar and dashi extract, perfect for a sick day. This plant-based friendly recipe is a unique twist on traditional dosa.

ingredients.name: Rice flour
ingredients.notes: preferably idli rice or dosa rice

instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine rice flour, sugar, and salt.
Gradually add coconut milk, water, and dashi extract to the dry ingredients and mix until smooth.
Add ghee or oil and mix well.
Cover the mixture and let it rest in a warm place for 2 hours to allow fermentation.
Once fermented, add active dry yeast and mix gently.
Heat a non-stick skillet or dosa pan over medium heat.
Pour a small amount of the batter onto the skillet and spread it evenly to form a thin circle.
Cook the dosa for 1-2 minutes, until the bottom is golden brown, then flip and cook for another minute.
Serve the pillowy sweet Indian rice dosa hot with your favorite filling or chutney.
